message: Rename from_tcp to accept_tcp and adapt tests

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: unknown key `bogus_option` in `tls` record
- --> tests/operators/from_tcp/tls/error_tls_invalid_option.tql:6:14
+ --> tests/operators/accept_tcp/tls/error_tls_invalid_option.tql:6:14
   |
-6 |          tls={bogus_option: true} { read_lines }
+6 |          tls={bogus_option: true} {
   |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
   |
   = hint: valid keys are: skip_peer_verification, cacert, certfile, keyfile, min_version, ciphers, client_ca, require_client_cert

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `tls.keyfile` must be a string
+ --> tests/operators/accept_tcp/tls/error_tls_keyfile_type.tql:6:14
+  |
+6 |          tls={keyfile: true} {
+  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: `tls.certfile` is required when `tls.keyfile` is set
- --> tests/operators/from_tcp/tls/error_tls_missing_certfile.tql:6:14
+ --> tests/operators/accept_tcp/tls/error_tls_missing_certfile.tql:6:14
   |
-6 |          tls={keyfile: "tests/operators/from_tcp/test.yaml"} { read_lines }
+6 |          tls={keyfile: "tests/operators/accept_tcp/test.yaml"} {
   |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
   |
   = hint: set both `tls.certfile` and `tls.keyfile`

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-suite: from-tcp-tls
+suite: accept-tcp-tls
 fixtures:
   - tcp:
       tls: true

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+accept_tcp env("TCP_ENDPOINT"),
+         tls={certfile: env("TCP_CERTKEYFILE"),
+              skip_peer_verification: true} {
+  read_lines
+}
+| head 1

@@ -1,6 +0,0 @@
-error: `tls.keyfile` must be a string
- --> tests/operators/from_tcp/tls/error_tls_keyfile_type.tql:6:14
-  |
-6 |          tls={keyfile: true} { read_lines }
-  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
-  |

@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@
----
-skip: flaky crash on macOS arm64 in from_tcp TLS shutdown path (tracked for follow-up redesign)
----
-
-from_tcp env("TCP_ENDPOINT"),
-         tls={certfile: env("TCP_CERTKEYFILE"),
-              skip_peer_verification: true} { read_lines }
-| head 1
